proposedContractValues.CORNERMEX_COMMERCE_MODEL: exact literal defined by the CORNERMEX_COMMERCE_MODEL field in src/config/commerce-env.ts (z.literal("single_merchant_with_internal_supplier_network"))

validationPlan: After the change, GET https://cornermex-web-staging.up.railway.app/api/ready and confirm CORNERMEX_COMMERCE_MODEL no longer appears in the errors array; also GET /api/health and confirm it still returns 200 ready/ok. A 503 with a different, new error (e.g. Supabase reachability) is a separate finding, not a validation failure of this specific change.
rollbackPlan: Operator notes the exact pre-change value out-of-band (outside this repository, not read by this contract) before applying the change, then restores that exact value and allows Railway to restart the service if the post-change verification fails or reveals an unexpected regression.
